title: Threeway action?
excerpt: I’m trying to use a formula to see if three things are true, if so give an “ok” status and “fcked" otherwise. I don’t think I can add a third condition to the IF(AND format like this →  IF(AND(condition1, condition2, con…

posts.author: John (John Refford)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to use a formula to see if three things are true, if so give an “ok” status and “fcked" otherwise. I don’t think I can add a third condition to the IF(AND format like this → IF(AND(condition1, condition2, condition3, “ok”, "fcked”). How can I test 3 conditions?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi John,

Did you try it? Because, from my testing, you can have as many conditions as you want in the AND clause.

posts.author: John (John Refford)
posts.cookedHtml: @GCavin Yes! I finally figured it out. Thank you for taking the time to point me in the right direction. I appreciate you!
